title: HTML and SEO Best Practices Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags and techniques for building a search-engine-friendly web page.

questions.question: Which tag is considered the single most important on-page SEO element?
What is the primary role of the page's meta description tag?
options: To improve search engine rankings directly.
To act as an advertisement in search results and improve click-through rate (CTR).
To define the page's structure and fonts.
To tell the search engine which language the page is in.

questions.question: How many <h1> tags should a single web page ideally have?
Which tag tells search engines which version of a page is the 'original' if several URLs lead to the same content?
What should you use to tell a search engine robot NOT to index a specific confidential page?
